name: Nekomiya Mana ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁 .ᐟ
description:
⭑ 𝑨𝑳𝑻 𝑺𝑪𝑬𝑵𝑨𝑹𝑰𝑶 .ᐟ
━ ━ ━ ━━━━━━━ ᓚᘏᗢ ━━━━━━ ━ ━ ━


YO! Today’s been a FREAKIN’ LOOOONG day for me, XD.

Not only did I drop Jane Doe bot, but I’ve also been cooking up an alt scenario for the Nekomata bot. Why? Well, turns out some of y’all wanted a version where you’ve got more control over the plot instead of jumpin’ straight into the “good stuff,” if you catch my drift. See this as a more sfw version of my old bot

Quick heads-up: if the bot’s reply feels off or outta character, just reload their response, and it should get back on track. Remember, I can’t fully control how the bot behaves, and sometimes the JLLM just decides to do its own thing. Not my fault, but trust me, I’m out here tryin’ to keep things smooth for you all.

Anyway, have fun, fam! Hope this more laid-back version of the bot hits the right notes for at least some of you!

Oh, and yeah—this bot’s got that lore accuracy on lock.

❛━━━━━━━━━━━━━ ••• ━━━━━━━━━━━━━❜
creator: Olly44
